description: Pattern library for preventing recurring AI mistakes in Alleato-Procore

patterns.name: NetworkIdle Timeout
patterns.summary: Use domcontentloaded instead of networkidle for Playwright navigation

patterns.name: Auth Fixture Missing
patterns.summary: Import from fixtures instead of @playwright/test for authenticated API requests

patterns.name: Route Parameter Mismatch
patterns.summary: Always use [projectId] not [id] for project routes - check existing routes before creating

patterns.name: Premature Completion Claims
patterns.summary: Never claim completion without gate checksums and verification evidence

patterns.name: Foreign Key Constraint on User Profile
patterns.summary: Check if user profile exists before setting created_by foreign key

patterns.name: Stale Supabase Types
patterns.summary: Always run supabase gen types before writing database code

patterns.name: Nil-UUID Cascade
patterns.summary: Parent-not-loaded React hooks fire with the nil UUID. Use assertNonNilUuid server-side and `enabled: !!parent.id` client-side.

patterns.name: Generic Error Swallow
patterns.summary: Hardcoded 'Unexpected error' / 'Failed to load X' messages erase the real Supabase error. PostgrestError is a plain object, not an Error subclass, so instanceof checks miss it.

patterns.name: PostgREST Embed & Select Quirks
triggers: more than one relationship was found
patterns.summary: Multi-FK embeds and quoted-identifiers-with-spaces both produce runtime errors that never typecheck. Use !fk_name hints and snake_case column names.

patterns.name: Telemetry Noise Classification
patterns.summary: Expected behaviors (auth failures, library lock contention, 4xx user-validation) were being logged as application errors, burying real bugs under noise.

patterns.name: apiFetch<T> Null Passthrough
triggers: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined
patterns.summary: apiFetch<T> returns null at runtime for 204/empty responses despite typing T. Nulls flow into array operations and crash the renderer.

patterns.name: Schema Rename Drift
patterns.summary: Column rename leaves stragglers in .select() string literals that don't typecheck. Sweep every literal reference after a rename.

patterns.name: Status Endpoint Sequential I/O
triggers: did not complete within retry policy
patterns.summary: Status/health endpoints with 10+ sequential DB queries exceed the upstream timeout. Cache at the source with double-checked locking and degrade gracefully at the proxy.

solutions.name: DOMContentLoaded Navigation Pattern
solutions.summary: Use domcontentloaded and element selectors instead of networkidle

solutions.name: Universal Auth Fixture Pattern
solutions.summary: Create and use auth fixture for all API tests

solutions.name: Verification Gate Pattern
solutions.summary: Use enforce-gates.ts to generate checksums before claiming completion

solutions.name: assertNonNilUuid Helper
solutions.summary: Shared guardrail that rejects the nil UUID at the top of every UUID-param API route handler

solutions.name: Error Message Fidelity
solutions.summary: Two-layer fix: asGuardrailError handles plain-object errors; throw sites interpolate the underlying error message

solutions.name: PostgREST FK Disambiguation
solutions.summary: Use !fk_name hints for multi-FK embeds; rename columns with spaces to snake_case

solutions.name: Telemetry Suppress-List
solutions.summary: Two-layer suppress-list (server withApiGuardrails + client reportApiFailure) keeps expected behaviors out of /errors

injectionRules.description: Rules for auto-injecting patterns into agent prompts

usage.forAgents: Read relevant patterns before starting work. Match task keywords against trigger arrays.
usage.forHumans: Review patterns when debugging recurring issues.
usage.forAutomation: Parse index.json to inject patterns into agent prompts based on triggers.
